name: Claim denied by Google for AI Overview error - next steps?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied by Google for AI Overview error - next steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal first; lawsuit unlikely to succeed.
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal internally, then consider lawsuit if viable, but expect Section 230 bar.[2] Key factors: Policy terms; harm proof; jurisdiction. Document denial. Nationwide.
